title: Dhammapada, Chapter 4: Flowers
description: Chapter 4 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.
introduction: Chapter 4 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.

text: Who shall conquer this earth and the realm of Yama and this world of the gods? Who shall select a well-taught verse as a skilled person selects a flower?
